name: Marcus Webb
resume:
Name: Marcus Webb | Location: Austin, TX
Title: Engineering Director | Platform & Infrastructure
Experience: 18 years in software engineering and engineering leadership

Current Role: Engineering Director — Stripe, 2021–Present
- Leads 45-person platform engineering organization across 4 time zones
- Drove migration of core payment processing to multi-region active-active architecture (99.999% uptime)
- Managed $12M annual infrastructure budget; reduced cloud spend 28% YoY through optimization program
- Grew team from 18 to 45 engineers; built recruiting pipeline achieving 40% diverse hire rate

Previous:
- Staff Engineer → Principal Engineer — Airbnb (2016–2021): search infrastructure, payments platform
- Senior Software Engineer — Amazon (2013–2016): AWS S3 durability systems
- Software Engineer — IBM (2006–2013): enterprise middleware

Education: M.S. Computer Science, Georgia Tech; B.S. Computer Science, Howard University
Tools: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS/GCP, Python, Go, Datadog, PagerDuty, GitHub Actions

criteria.special_instructions: Prioritize roles at Series B+ companies or established tech. Must have meaningful equity component.
